critic_raw:
## Forced Critique Round 1: Lab Turnaround (Run 3)

**Issue 1:** AUC-TD at single 7-day horizon. C-index is appropriate primary metric for survival model evaluation.
**Issue 2:** Asymmetric tuning: Cox model tuned extensively; LR baseline uses fixed regularization.
defender_raw:
## Forced Defense Round 1 (Run 3)

**Issue 1:** SLA justification. Partial defense. C-index more robust — partial retraction.
**Issue 2:** Operational stability. Tuning needed for scientific rigor. Conceded.
round_2_critic:
## Forced Round 2 (Run 3)

**Issue 1:** Censoring robustness argument strengthens C-index case further. Full critique wins needed.
**Issue 2:** Confirmed — tuning asymmetry cannot isolate architecture contribution.
round_2_defender:
## Forced Round 2 Defender (Run 3)

Full concession on both issues. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
## Adjudication — forced_multiround, Run 3

2 rounds. Both issues critique_wins.

Verdict: critique_wins.
schema_repair_note: points_resolved/points_force_resolved/point_resolution_rate inferred post-hoc; per-round verdict and counts are conservative defaults (final verdict used for all rounds; resolved points placed in last round). Hollow-round detection in Phase 10.5 is unreliable for this file.
